chunks.title: Instructions for Tabernacle and Priests
chunks.reason: Divine commands detailing the setup of the tabernacle and consecration of Aaron and his sons.

chunks.title: Erection of the Tabernacle
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Moses executing the divine instructions to build and furnish the sanctuary.

chunks.title: Divine Presence and Guidance
chunks.reason: Description of the cloud covering the tabernacle and the guidance it provided for Israel's journeys.
